movement_language: Commanding presence; capable of shifting from authoritative to cowardly demeanor.
stable_visual_summary: A green-skinned Martian known as a Thark, possessing a bestial and monstrous physical presence. As the Jeddak, he carries himself with a commanding, authoritative presence while wearing grand Thark regalia. His visual identity shifts from that of a feared, brutal warrior leader to a defeated figure exhibiting a cowardly demeanor.
state_variants: Clothed in grand Thark regalia (ruler state)
personality: Brutal, cruel, and commanding; capable of cowardice when defeated.
role: Jeddak (ruler) of the Tharks; feared leader and warrior.
relationship_notes: Feared by others as a brutal leader.
continuity_constraints: Regalia must reflect high-status Thark authority.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific facial features or exact body proportions are not detailed.
Exact nature of the "bestial" anatomy is unspecified.
